title: 急速に円高進む 一時1ドル155円台に 再び市場介入との見方も

title: 北朝鮮の女子サッカーチームが韓国訪問へ 韓国統一省発表

title: 茂木外相 アフリカ政策スピーチ 平和や成長の好循環目指す

title: きょう日豪首脳会談 経済安全保障協力の指針となる共同宣言へ

title: 【詳細】ロシア ウクライナに軍事侵攻（5月3日の動き）
snippet: ロシアによるウクライナに対する軍事侵攻が続いています。ウクライナの各地でロシア軍とウクライナ軍が戦闘を続けていて、大勢の市民が国外へ避難しています。戦闘の状況や関係各国の外交など、ウクライナ情勢をめぐ…

title: ASEAN＋3 経済の減速リスクやインフレ懸念踏まえ“結束”確認
snippet: 日本・中国・韓国とASEAN＝東南アジア諸国連合の財務相・中央銀行総裁会議が開かれ、イラン情勢を受けた経済の減速リスクやインフレへの懸念を踏まえ、共同声明で地域の結束と協力の重要性を確認しました。

title: 自民 小林政調会長 インド与党幹部と会談 経済安保で協力確認
snippet: 自民党の小林政務調査会長は、訪問先のインドで与党・インド人民党のナビン総裁と会談し、両党の交流を深めていくとともに、エネルギーや半導体など、経済安全保障分野での両国の協力を共に後押ししていくことを確認…

title: ゼレンスキー大統領「ロシアの”影の船団”を攻撃」
snippet: ウクライナのゼレンスキー大統領は、ウクライナ軍が、ロシア産の石油を運ぶいわゆる「影の船団」とみられるタンカーをロシア南部の港付近で攻撃したと明らかにしました。ウクライナは、製油所などエネルギー施設への…

title: 日本とケニアの外相 OSA活用含め安全保障協力の強化で一致
snippet: 茂木外務大臣は訪問先のケニアでムダバディ外相と会談し、日本が防衛装備品を提供する枠組みの活用を含めた安全保障協力の強化で一致するとともに、国際秩序の維持・強化に共に取り組みたいと呼びかけました。

title: OPECプラス主要産油国 UAE抜きで増産決定
snippet: サウジアラビアなどOPECプラスの主な産油国は、原油の1日当たりの生産量を6月は18万バレル余り増やすと発表しました。UAE＝アラブ首長国連邦が脱退したあとも、産油国どうしで引き続き協調する姿勢を示し…

title: Two killed and many injured after car driven into crowd in German city of Leipzig
snippet: A 33-year-old German citizen was detained following the incident, the authorities say.

title: Three dead in suspected virus outbreak on Atlantic cruise ship
snippet: The operator of the MV Hondius ship says a Dutch husband and wife, as well as a German national, have died but the cause has not yet been established.

title: Former New York City mayor Rudy Giuliani recovering from pneumonia and 'now breathing on his own'
snippet: The ex-New York mayor 'remains in critical but stable condition', according to his spokesman.

title: Ukrainian drone hits upmarket Moscow high-rise ahead of Victory Day celebrations
snippet: Russia has declared a unilateral ceasefire to cover the event and threatened a massive strike on central Kyiv if it were disrupted.

title: Britney Spears pleads guilty to reckless driving after arrest
snippet: The 44-year-old will avoid jail time after her arrest in California earlier this year.

title: Three Russian diplomats expelled from Austria over spying accusations
snippet: They gathered information using a "forest of antennas" installed on top of diplomatic buildings, the foreign minister says.

title: Mali junta leader names himself defence minister after predecessor killed
snippet: Former Defence Minister Sadio Camara was killed in a massive offensive by combined jihadist and separatist forces.

title: Spain seizes record amount of cocaine in Atlantic Ocean, authorities say
snippet: The Civil Guard found between 30,000 and 45,000kg of the drug on a freighter headed to Libya.

title: Modi's BJP conquers Bengal, one of India's toughest political frontiers
snippet: West Bengal’s verdict could reshape not just the state’s politics, but the future trajectory of Modi’s BJP.

title: Antisemitism 'allowed to come into the open' says Bondi victim's daughter

title: GameStop makes $55.5bn takeover offer for eBay
snippet: GameStop's boss Ryan Cohen says he sees potential to make eBay a much bigger rival to Amazon.

title: New alliance shakes up Nigerian political landscape
snippet: Peter Obi and Rabiu Kwankwaso, who came third and fourth respectively in the last elections, switch parties.

title: Three dead after monster truck crashes into crowd
snippet: At least 38 people were injured when the vehicle ploughed into the crowd at a show in Colombia.

title: European leaders converge on Armenia as Russia looks on
snippet: Two European summits are being held in a country long considered Russia's closest ally in the region.

title: North Korean side to make rare trip to South Korea
snippet: A team of North Korean footballers will make a rare visit to South Korea later this month.
